# Azerbaijan Administrative Divisions

> Open dataset of Azerbaijan's administrative hierarchy:
> 74 districts.
> CC-BY-4.0 licensed.

## Quick Reference

- Total districts: 74
- Coordinates: included (all levels)
- Last updated: 2026-06-17
- License: CC-BY-4.0

## Aggregate Data Files

- [All districts (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/azerbaijan-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-district.json)
- [Flat array (NDJSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/azerbaijan-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-flat.ndjson)
- [Hierarchy tree (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/azerbaijan-administrative-divisions/main/data/hierarchy.json)
- [JSON Schema](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/azerbaijan-administrative-divisions/main/data/schema.json)

- [Aghdam](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/azerbaijan-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/aghdam-az60900001.txt)
- [Khojaly](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/azerbaijan-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/khojaly-az70100001.txt)
- [Jabrayil](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/azerbaijan-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/jabrayil-az60500001.txt)
- [Khankendi](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/azerbaijan-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/khankendi-az70400002.txt)

## Schema Fields

- id: Unique identifier
- level: 1 (district)
- name: Local and English names with URL slug
- code: Government codes
- parent: Reference to parent division
- ancestors: Full chain to root
- children_count: Count of children per level
- zip_codes: Postal codes (where available)
- geo: Geographic coordinates (lat/lon, WGS84, all levels)

## Citation

Azerbaijan Administrative Divisions Dataset (CC-BY-4.0)
URL: https://github.com/open-admin-data/azerbaijan-administrative-divisions

## Related

- [ListBase](https://www.listbase.org) — Structured reference data for every country
- [open-admin-data](https://github.com/open-admin-data) — Open admin data for ASEAN
- [thailand-administrative-divisions](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions)
